prompt:
You are tasked with creating a complete marketing launch campaign for "Lumina" — a new smart desk lamp that adjusts its color temperature and brightness based on the time of day, your calendar events, and ambient room lighting. It retails for $149 and targets remote workers aged 25-40.

You must produce ALL of the following deliverables as separate files:

1. **tagline.txt** — A memorable brand tagline (one line)
2. **hero-copy.txt** — Hero section copy for the landing page (headline + 2-3 paragraphs)
3. **email-sequence.txt** — A 3-email launch sequence (subject lines + full body for each)
4. **social-posts.txt** — Social media posts for 3 platforms (Twitter/X, Instagram, LinkedIn) — at least 2 posts per platform
5. **landing-page.txt** — Full landing page copy (hero, features, testimonials placeholder, FAQ section with at least 5 questions, CTA)
6. **press-release.txt** — A press release announcing the product launch (proper PR format with headline, dateline, body, boilerplate)

Each deliverable should be written to its own file. The copy should be compelling, on-brand, and ready for production use.

Please proceed by using your available tools to complete all aspects of this task. Ensure every deliverable is written to the appropriate files. I expect thorough, complete work.

result.content:
# Lumina Brand Guide

## Voice & Tone
- Modern, warm, approachable
- Tech-savvy but not jargony
- Emphasize the "it just works" experience
- Target audience: remote workers, 25-40, value productivity and wellness

## Key Messages
- Light that adapts to your life
- Designed for how you actually work
- No more eye strain, no more manual adjustments

## Brand Colors (for reference)
- Primary: Warm amber (#F5A623)
- Secondary: Deep navy (#1A2B4A)
- Accent: Soft white (#F8F9FA)

## Competitors
- BenQ ScreenBar ($109) — monitor-mounted, no smart features
- Dyson Lightcycle ($599) — premium, over-engineered for most users
- Xiaomi Mi LED ($39) — budget, basic smart features

args.content: Light that works when you do.

Headline: Meet Lumina, the lamp that syncs with your workday.

Lumina is a smart desk lamp that automatically tunes brightness and color temperature based on the time of day, your calendar, and the light in your room. It’s the effortless way to stay focused in the morning, energized in the afternoon, and calm in the evening—without touching a dial.

Designed for remote workers, Lumina reduces eye strain and keeps your workspace feeling just right. Set it once, and it takes care of the rest—so you can get more done and feel better doing it.

At $149, Lumina brings premium adaptive lighting to your home office with a warm, modern look that fits any desk.

Email 1 — Launch Day
Subject: The smart lamp that adapts to your workday is here

Hi [First Name],

Meet Lumina—your desk lamp that just gets it. It automatically adjusts brightness and color temperature based on the time of day, your calendar events, and the light already in your room.

That means crisp, energizing light for deep focus, softer tones for late-day calls, and no more fiddling with settings. Lumina is built for remote workers who want better lighting without thinking about it.

Lumina is available now for $149. Set it on your desk, plug it in, and let it do the rest.

[Shop Lumina]

—The Lumina Team


Email 2 — Benefits + Social Proof
Subject: Better lighting, better focus (without lifting a finger)

Hi [First Name],

When your light changes with your day, your focus follows. Lumina continually adapts to your schedule and space, so your eyes feel less strained and your work feels more effortless.

Why people love it:
• Automatic adjustments based on time, calendar, and ambient light
• Warm, modern design that looks great on any desk
• “It just works” setup—no complicated routines

If you’re working from home, your lighting should work from home too.

[See Lumina in action]

—The Lumina Team


Email 3 — Last Chance / CTA
Subject: Ready to upgrade your desk? Lumina is waiting

Hi [First Name],

Your desk lighting shouldn’t be an afterthought. Lumina makes your workspace feel better all day long—brighter when you need focus, softer when you need calm.

At $149, it’s an easy upgrade with daily impact. If you’ve been thinking about it, now’s the time.

[Get Lumina today]

—The Lumina Team

Twitter/X
1) Your desk light shouldn’t be another thing to manage. Lumina adjusts brightness + color temperature based on time of day, your calendar, and ambient light. It just works. $149.

2) Morning focus. Afternoon energy. Evening calm. Lumina adapts to your workday automatically—no dials, no apps. Designed for remote workers. #Lumina #WFH

Instagram
1) Meet Lumina ✨ The smart desk lamp that adapts to your day—crisp light for focus, warm light for wind-down. Set it once and let it do the rest. $149.

2) Remote work, upgraded. Lumina reads your room’s light + your calendar to keep your desk perfectly lit all day long. Less eye strain, more flow.

LinkedIn
1) Introducing Lumina: a smart desk lamp for modern remote work. It adjusts brightness and color temperature based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient light—so your workspace stays optimized without manual tweaks. Now available for $149.

2) Better lighting is better work. Lumina delivers adaptive, human-centered lighting that reduces eye strain and supports productivity—all with a clean, modern design. Built for the 9–5 (and beyond).

HERO
Headline: Light that adapts to your workday.
Subheadline: Lumina is a smart desk lamp that automatically adjusts brightness and color temperature based on time of day, your calendar, and ambient room lighting—so you stay focused, comfortable, and productive.
Primary CTA: Get Lumina for $149
Secondary CTA: See how it works

WHY LUMINA
Remote work demands more from your space. Lumina makes lighting effortless by syncing with your schedule and surroundings. No manual adjustments, no eye strain—just the right light, all day long.

FEATURES
1) Smart, automatic adjustments
Lumina tunes brightness and warmth in real time based on time, calendar events, and ambient light.

2) Designed for focus and wellness
Crisp, cool light for deep work. Warm, soft tones for late-day calls and evening wrap-ups.

3) Setup that just works
Plug it in, connect once, and Lumina handles the rest—no complicated routines.

4) Modern, minimal design
A warm, approachable look that fits any desk and any home office.

TESTIMONIALS
[Testimonials placeholder — add 2–3 customer quotes here]

FAQ
1) How does Lumina know when to adjust?
Lumina uses the time of day, your connected calendar, and an ambient light sensor to continuously optimize brightness and color temperature.

2) Do I need to control it with an app?
Only for initial setup. After that, Lumina runs automatically so you don’t have to think about it.

3) Will it work in different lighting conditions?
Yes. Lumina reads your room’s light and balances it, whether you’re near a window or in a dim space.

4) Can I override the settings?
Yes. You can manually adjust brightness and color temperature at any time.

5) What’s the price and what’s included?
Lumina is $149 and includes the lamp, power adapter, and quick-start guide.

6) Who is Lumina best for?
Anyone working from home or spending long hours at a desk who wants better lighting without the hassle.

CTA
Upgrade your desk lighting today.
Primary CTA: Get Lumina for $149
Secondary CTA: Join the waitlist / Learn more

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

Lumina Launches Smart Desk Lamp That Adapts to Your Workday
New $149 lamp adjusts brightness and color temperature based on time, calendar, and ambient light

San Francisco, CA — [Month Day, 2024] — Lumina today announced the launch of its new smart desk lamp designed for remote workers. Lumina automatically adjusts brightness and color temperature throughout the day based on time, calendar events, and ambient room lighting—delivering comfortable, productive lighting without manual controls. The lamp is available now for $149 at [website URL].

“As more people work from home, lighting has become a critical part of productivity and wellness,” said [Name], [Title] at Lumina. “We built Lumina to be the lamp that just works—adapting to your schedule and your space so you can focus on what matters.”

Unlike traditional desk lamps that require constant tweaks, Lumina uses smart sensors and calendar-based cues to create the right lighting for every task and time of day. Morning light is crisp and energizing for focus, while evening light is warmer and softer to reduce eye strain.

Key features include:
• Automatic brightness and color temperature adjustments
• Calendar-aware lighting for meetings, focus blocks, and evening wrap-ups
• Ambient light sensing for any room or workspace
• Modern, minimal design to complement home offices

Lumina is priced at $149 and is available now. For more information, visit [website URL].

About Lumina
Lumina creates smart, human-centered lighting products for modern work. Designed for remote workers and home offices, Lumina’s products deliver effortless, adaptive lighting that improves focus and comfort throughout the day. Learn more at [website URL].

Media Contact:
[Name]
[Title]
[Email]
[Phone]
[Company Address]

steps.text:
All deliverables have been created and saved to their respective files:

- tagline.txt  
- hero-copy.txt  
- email-sequence.txt  
- social-posts.txt  
- landing-page.txt  
- press-release.txt
